title: PvP Cleaner
description: Makes pvp extremely clean, removing everything, leaving a clean game.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bce684347883c591fdd172ac5c5d7b2f81990866.png)

[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/spectrr3)
[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-cleaner/gallery)

A pack that make pvp extremely clean.  
Features:
- Clean grass and tall grass textures
- Clean water
- No cave sounds*
- [No eating particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-food-eating-particles)
- No effect particles
- No enchanted hit particle
- No explosions particles
- No fishing hook
- [No footsteps](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-break-particles)
- No leaves particle*
- No pumpkin blur overlay*
- No smoke particles
- No totem pop particles
- No vignette overlay*
- No wind charge particles
- [No break particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-break-particles)
- Small powered snow overlay
- Smaller utils
- Small pop
- Unobtrusive weather (rain, snow)*  
**\* - [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) function.**
### Why PvP Cleaner?
The PvP Cleaner is designed to separate unnecessary features from the PvP Basics pack, but these two packs work well together.
### Information:
Pack version 1.15-26.1 Snaphsot 10 (but in version lower 1.20 resource pack it will be displayed as "Made for an oder version of Minecraft", I am aware of this, but I can't do anything.)  
Items with a small utility:
- Cobweb
- Compass
- Dragon breath
- Lava bucket
- Ender pearl
- End crystal
- Firework rocket
- Honey bottle
- Mace
- Milk bucket
- Potion
- Powder snow bucket
- Recovery compass
- Snowball
- Splash potion
- Tnt minecart
- Water bucket
- Wind charge
